value: PROJECT: PROVIDING OF 24 X 7 DRINKING WATER SUPPLY INCLUDING 115 MLD WATER TREATMENT PLANT & ITS ALLIED WORKS INCLUDING O & M OF 10 YEARS AT PATIALA, PUNJAB

Lime dosing tanks to inlet chamber - Flow measurement
DWPE dosing tanks to centrifuge - Flow measurement
